title: Extreme Dehydration
description: A simple mod that added thirst mechanic. Watch what you drink
body:
Player must regularly drink water to stay alive. Water can be collected in bottles and purified by boiling it on a campfire. Drinking unclean water is dangerous and may cause poisoning. Ignoring thirst for too long will eventually lead to death.

This mod is designed to make survival more immersive without overcomplicating gameplay.
